loginPicker.label: Layout
loginPicker.loadError: Could not load the list of layouts.

admin.title: Layouts
admin.subtitle: All layouts (the default layout is always available and cannot be deleted or locked).

create.title: New layout
create.nameHelp: A short label identifying the layout (e.g. "Modelfest 2026").

delete.title: Delete layout "{{name}}"
delete.message: This operation is irreversible. Active sessions pinned to this layout will keep running until they close, but nobody will be able to log into it any more.

lock.title: Lock layout "{{name}}"
lock.message: A locked layout disappears from the login screen, but live sessions stay open. You can unlock it again at any time.

admin.empty: There are no layouts to display.
